title: Calcutta University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Calcutta University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Calcutta University has released the B.Com Semester V Results 2026 for the 2025-26 academic session. Candidates can view and download their results from the official University of Calcutta exam portal at cuexam.net.

content.text: The University of Calcutta has officially released the B.Com Semester V Examination 2025 results under the CCF and CBCS curriculum for the 2025-26 academic session. The latest result notification announces the publication of B.Com 5th semester examination results and provides detailed instructions for candidates and colleges regarding marks and result processing. Calcutta University Result 2026 has been announced online on the official website - caluniv.ac.in.

Students can check and download their B.Com Semester 5 result by visiting the exam portal cuexam.net, opening the relevant notice/result link and accessing their marksheet using examination details as required. After viewing or downloading the result, candidates should carefully verify their personal details, college name, subject-wise marks and overall result status, and contact the University of Calcutta or their respective college in case of any discrepancy.

Calcutta University has published the B.Com Semester V Examinations 2025 (Under CCF and CBCS) result notification for the 2026 result cycle on its official exam portal. This update is particularly important for B.Com students under CCF and CBCS who appeared in the 5th semester examinations in 2025 and are awaiting their results for progression and completion of the course. Students can access the notice and result related details through cuexam.net and follow the instructions to check their individual performance and download their provisional marksheet.

Calcutta University has activated the B.Com Semester V Examination 2025 result notification and related links on its exam portal for quick access by students. Through the official notice link, B.Com candidates can read the result publication details and follow the given path to check their individual marks for the 5th semester under CCF and CBCS. Students should always use the official cuexam.net and caluniv.ac.in portals to check their Calcutta University Result 2026 and avoid any unofficial websites.

links.label: Notice for publication of result for B.Com. Semester-V Examinations, 2025 (Under CCF and CBCS)

sections.heading: Steps to Check Calcutta University Result 2026

items: Visit the official University of Calcutta examination portal at cuexam.net.
Click on the Exam Notice or Result/Notice section, or directly open the exam notice page link.
Look for the notification titled "Notice for publication of result for B.Com. Semester-V Examinations, 2025 (Under CCF & CBCS)" dated May 05 2026.
Click on the relevant notice link to open the PDF and read the result publication details and instructions.
Follow the instructions in the notice or use the result section link (if provided) to reach the B.Com Semester 5 result page.
Enter your examination details such as roll number, registration number or other asked credentials to view your B.Com 5th semester result.
Check your name, roll number, college, subject-wise marks and overall result status carefully.
Download or print the provisional marksheet for future reference, admission process and academic records.
In case of any problem while checking the result or any error in your marksheet, contact your college examination section or the University of Calcutta through official channels.
